caja_texto.js: var dialog = document.querySelector('div[role="dialog"], div[role="presentation"]'); if (!dialog) return null; var le = dialog.querySelector('div[data-lexical-editor="true"]'); if (le && le.offsetParent !== null) return le; var tb = dialog.querySelector('div[role="textbox"][contenteditable="true"]'); if (tb && tb.offsetParent !== null) return tb; var ce = document.querySelectorAll('div[contenteditable="true"]'); for (var c of ce) { if (c.offsetParent !== null && c.offsetHeight > 20) return c; } return null;

boton_foto.js: var dialog = document.querySelector('div[role="dialog"]'); if (!dialog) return null; var keywords = ['foto', 'photo', 'video', 'imagen', 'image', 'picture']; var buttons = dialog.querySelectorAll('div[role="button"], div[tabindex="0"]'); for (var b of buttons) { var label = (b.getAttribute('aria-label') || '').toLowerCase(); for (var kw of keywords) { if (label.includes(kw) && b.offsetParent !== null) return b; } } return null;

sesion_ok.js: if (document.cookie.includes('c_user=')) return document.body; var accMenu = document.querySelector('div[aria-label*="cuenta" i], div[aria-label*="Account" i]'); if (accMenu && accMenu.offsetParent !== null) return document.body; return null;
